[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1110110111 8
3 1101111101 8
4 1110000011 5
5 1011111111 9
6 0111110011 7
7 1111111100 8
